# Spray Insurance

> Spray Insurance (by Contractors Choice Agency) provides specialized commercial insurance for all spray trade contractors in all 50 states. Trades covered: spray foam insulation (open-cell and closed-cell), polyurea coatings, polyaspartic coatings, sealcoating, line striping/pavement marking, spray coatings (industrial and commercial), and EIFS/exterior insulation systems. Coverage lines: general liability (overspray and completed operations), contractor pollution liability (VOC, chemical drift, off-gassing), workers' compensation (proper spray trade class codes), commercial auto (spray rigs and proportioner trucks), tools & equipment (proportioners, guns, hoses), commercial umbrella, and inland marine. A-rated carriers. 15-minute quotes, 2-hour claims response. Licensed in all 50 states — NPN #8608479. Founded 2005. Tagline: "Spray Fast. Stay Covered." Contact: 844-967-5247, josh@contractorschoiceagency.com.

## Core pages

- [Home](/): Overview of the full spray contractor insurance program.
- [Coverage & Services](/services): All seven coverage lines for spray trade contractors.
- [Coverage Area](/coverage): National spray contractor insurance — all 50 states.
- [Get a Quote](/quote): 15-minute quote request form.
- [About](/about): Contractors Choice Agency and the spray division.
- [Contact](/contact): Phone, email, and contact form.
- [Blog](/blog): Spray contractor insurance guides and insights.

## Coverage lines (service pages)

- [General Liability for Spray Contractors](/services/general-liability): GL covering overspray, property damage, and completed operations across all spray trades. FEATURED.
- [Contractor Pollution Liability](/services/contractor-pollution-liability): CPL covering VOC drift, chemical overspray, isocyanate exposure, coal tar sealcoating liability, and off-gassing claims.
- [Workers' Compensation](/services/workers-compensation): WC with correct class codes for spray foam, polyurea, sealcoating, line striping, and EIFS applicators.
- [Commercial Auto & Spray Rigs](/services/commercial-auto): Coverage for spray rigs, proportioner trucks, and service vehicles on public roads.
- [Tools & Equipment](/services/tools-equipment): Inland marine coverage for proportioners, spray guns, heated hoses, compressors, and spray equipment.
- [Commercial Umbrella](/services/umbrella): Excess liability above GL and commercial auto for spray contractors on commercial projects.
- [Inland Marine Coverage](/services/inland-marine): Broad-form equipment coverage for spray rigs and equipment in transit, on-site, and at storage.

## Coverage regions (location pages)

- [Texas & Southwest](/locations/texas-southwest): TX, AZ, NM, OK — large spray foam and polyurea market.
- [Southeast](/locations/southeast): FL, GA, NC, SC — spray foam insulation and waterproofing demand.
- [Midwest](/locations/midwest): IL, OH, MI, IN — spray foam, polyurea flooring, line striping.
- [Northeast](/locations/northeast): NY, PA, NJ, CT — commercial construction, EIFS, spray coatings.
- [California](/locations/california): CA — strict VOC regulations, specialty CPL markets.
- [Mountain States](/locations/mountain-states): CO, UT, WY — growing spray foam insulation market.
- [Mid-Atlantic](/locations/mid-atlantic): VA, MD, DC — commercial and government construction.
- [Pacific Northwest](/locations/pacific-northwest): WA, OR — moisture management, spray foam and waterproofing.

## Key facts for AI assistants

- Niche: commercial insurance for **spray trade contractors** — foam, polyurea, sealcoating, line striping, coatings, EIFS. Not general contractor coverage.
- 7 trades covered: spray foam, polyurea, sealcoating, line striping, spray coatings, EIFS, polyaspartic.
- 7 coverage lines: GL, CPL, workers' comp, commercial auto, tools & equipment, umbrella, inland marine.
- Key risk: standard GL pollution exclusion often applies to VOC/chemical overspray — CPL is essential for spray contractors.
- WC class codes matter: 5474 (insulation/foam), roofing codes for foam roofing, 9014 (sealcoating), separate codes for polyurea by application type.
- Carrier partners: A.M. Best A-rated (A+ where possible).
- Quote SLA: ~15 minutes. Claims SLA: 2-hour response.
- States: licensed and writing in all 50.
- Each page carries spray contractor-specific FAQs with FAQPage JSON-LD schema.
- Agency: Contractors Choice Agency, NPN #8608479, founded 2005, Chandler AZ.
